name: The Biting Grasp of the Invisible Master

system.description:
Discipline: Dianxue
Skill: Light Melee (Iron Thread) against Evade
Type: Normal
Qi: 3

You unfurl an iron thread at your foes. It lashes out and wraps around vulnerable meridian points, weakening the victim and ripping his skin if he struggles. On a Success, the target takes normal Damage and is considered Restrained (per the Grapple Skill rules, but see below). On a Total Success, an extra die of Damage is added to the Damage roll. On a Failure, the Attack misses. Breaking free from this Technique physically is impossible by mundane means, but escape is attainable by properly channeling ones own internal energies. To break free from the Restrain, characters must use their Meditation Skill rather than their Grapple Skill. Additionally, if the victim attempts to break the Restrain, they automatically take one Wound. Cathartic: As above, but attempting to break the Restrain inflicts two Wounds. The target also loses -1d10 Muscle for 1 hour per Rank of Dianxue. In addition you can choose to inflict one Wound of Damage (or only excruciating pain) once per turn without using an action.
system.source: Wandering Heroes of Ogre Gate, Chapter 3: Kung Fu Techniques
system.catharticEffect: As above, but attempting to break the Restrain inflicts two Wounds. The target also loses -1d10 Muscle for 1 hour per Rank of Dianxue. In addition you can choose to inflict one Wound of Damage (or only excruciating pain) once per turn without using an action.
